# Templates

Copy these templates when creating new documentation artifacts.

## Available Templates

- `task.md` - use for implementation tasks in `docs/tasks/backlog/` or `docs/tasks/active/`.
- `user-story.md` - use for user-facing backlog items.
- `sprint.md` - use for sprint planning, review, and retro summary.
- `decision.md` - use for durable architecture or product decisions in `docs/decisions/`.

## Template Rules for Agents

- Copy the template before editing it.
- Keep references to related docs, code paths, issues, screenshots, and commands.
- Replace all placeholder text before marking work complete.
- If a task creates a new convention, update the relevant docs so future tasks can reference it.
